channel.title: Charter Ed Digest
channel.description: News, trends, and practical guidance for charter school leaders and families

item.title: The Gifted Gap: Charter Schools and Advanced Learners
item.description: Charter schools serving diverse students face a critical blind spot: gifted kids who go unidentified. Here's what leaders and families need to know.

item.title: Classical Charters and the Rise of the Principled Leader
item.description: Classical charter schools are redefining school choice by pairing academic rigor with character formation. Here's what families and leaders need to know in 2025.

item.title: Charter Enrollment Rises as Public School Rolls Shrink
item.description: Overall K-12 enrollment is falling, but charter schools are growing. Here's what the 2025 data reveals about why families are choosing mission-driven schools.

item.title: Why Charter Schools Lead the Mastery-Based Learning Shift
item.description: Every state now allows mastery-based learning, but charter schools have a structural head start. Here's what the growing policy momentum means for leaders and families.

item.title: Charter School Enrollment Hits Record Highs in 2025
item.description: Charter schools now serve nearly 4 million students—a 15% surge in six years. Here's what's driving the shift away from district schools and what it means for families.

item.title: The Attendance Crisis Schools Can't Ignore in 2025
item.description: Chronic absenteeism is stalling after years of decline. Here's what the 2025 data shows—and how charter schools are gaining ground through culture and belonging.

item.title: Microschools Are Rising. What Charter Schools Should Do Now
item.description: Microschools and hybrid learning are surging in 2025. Here's what charter school leaders need to know—and how to respond strategically.

item.title: How Charter Boards Drive—or Derail—School Quality
item.description: Research shows strong charter school boards are directly linked to better outcomes. Learn the signs of effective governance—and the red flags that matter.

item.title: Charter School Lotteries: What Families Need to Know
item.description: Charter school demand is at record highs. Here's how the lottery system works, why waitlists form, and what families can do to navigate the process.

item.title: Why 9th Grade Makes or Breaks High School Graduation
item.description: Research shows 9th grade is the strongest predictor of whether students graduate. Here's how charter schools use Freshman Academy models to keep students on track.

item.title: The Kindergarten Readiness Gap No One Talks About
item.description: Post-pandemic data reveals a growing kindergarten readiness crisis — and autistic children face steeper hurdles. Here's what the research shows and what families can do.

item.title: Mastery Over Minutes: The Rise of Competency-Based Learning in Charter Schools
item.description: Competency-based education is reshaping K-12. Here's what it means, why charter schools are leading the shift, and what it looks like in practice.

item.title: Why Charter Schools Struggle to Keep Great Teachers
item.description: Charter schools lose teachers at higher rates than traditional public schools. Here's what the research says—and what schools can do about it.

item.title: CTE in Charter Schools: Why Career Pathways Matter
item.description: K-12 CTE enrollment hit 8.6M students in 2024. Here's why career pathways are now a top reason families choose charter schools.

item.title: Why Student-Athletes Are Choosing Charter Schools
item.description: Millions of student-athletes can't fit a fixed bell schedule. Here's how flexible charter schools are solving the conflict between training and academics.

item.title: Beyond the Screen: How Online Charters Add In-Person Support
item.description: Online charter schools are evolving past fully at-home learning. Here's how the "virtual-plus" model uses physical learning centers to support students.

item.title: Same School, Two Pathways: The Dual-Format Charter Trend
item.description: More charter schools now offer both a physical campus and a virtual academy. Here's what's driving the trend and what families should look for.

item.title: Micro-Credentials: The Next Edge for Charter Schools
item.description: Micro-credentials are reshaping K-12 career readiness. Here's why charter schools—especially flexible and independent-study models—are poised to lead.

item.title: Why Charter Schools Struggle to Keep Great Teachers
item.description: Charter schools lose teachers at a higher rate than traditional public schools. Here's what the data says is driving it—and which retention strategies actually work.

item.title: What State Charter Advocacy Really Gets You in 2025
item.description: State charter associations delivered real 2025 policy wins: facilities funds, funding equity, zoning relief. Here's what strong advocacy means for your school.
